notes: Audio documentation for Myst (1993) is minimal in available sources. Wikipedia confirms Robyn Miller as composer but provides no details on tempos, keys, chord progressions, track names per area, or SFX characteristics. The TCRF source contained no usable game information. Further specialized audio documentation (soundtrack liner notes, developer interviews, or technical audio databases) would be required to populate tracks and detailed musical parameters for the Selenitic, Stoneship, Mechanical, and Channelwood ages mentioned in gameplay.
